name: Create Custom Price Order
description: Place an order for customer 'mikewilson' consisting of 'Samsung Galaxy Buds2 Pro' with a manual price override to $120.00 due to damaged packaging and 'Logitech MX Master 3S' at the regular price.
context: Customer Mike Wilson called to negotiate a deal on an open-box item. You need to create his order manually and apply the agreed-upon price.
